rationale: Tests whether extreme CBOE SKEW readings indicate over-hedged institutional fear and provide a contrarian long entry.
expected_failure_mode: SKEW can remain structurally elevated for years due to changing hedging behavior.
stop_conditions: candidate family remains crowded or redundant
hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
The strategy fails to exit cash for more than 12 consecutive months.
Share accumulation trails buy-and-hold during the 2020-2021 bull run.
